# Regex patterns (ERE) that MUST appear in the rendered hermes.container.
# One per line; blank lines and #-comments are skipped. If any pattern is
# absent, _check_quadlet fails.

# Container identity (rendered from template tokens)
^Image=
^Exec=
^Volume=.*:/opt/data:rw$

# Hardening — immutable rootfs + ephemeral scratch
^ReadOnly=true$
^Tmpfs=/tmp:
^Tmpfs=/run:
^Tmpfs=/workspace:

# Hardening — caps + privilege. DropCapability=all, then add back ONLY the
# exact minimal set the image's s6 init needs to drop to uid 10000 + own
# /opt/data. Pinned exactly so drift toward broader caps fails the suite.
^DropCapability=all$
^AddCapability=CHOWN DAC_OVERRIDE FOWNER SETGID SETUID$
^NoNewPrivileges=true$

# Hardening — resource limits
^PidsLimit=
--memory=
--memory-swap=
--cpus=
--shm-size=
--pull=never
